summary: A Go-based monolithic tool leveraging MCP for orchestration and providing Goss configuration migration capabilities.
concerns: Highly fragmented test generation history via multiple AI agents (0005-0014) suggests potential test quality inconsistency
Proliferation of _extra_test.go files indicates tests may be artificially segregated rather than co-located
Clean git status immediately after a burst of agent-driven commits might mask unreviewed or superficial test coverage
suggestions: Consolidate extra test files into their standard _test.go counterparts to improve maintainability
Audit the AI-generated tests for actual edge-case coverage versus simple happy-path assertions
Focus on the core runner and MCP handler logic to ensure the foundation is solid before expanding test matrices
